keys.backupCreated: An ƙirƙiri ajiyar maɓalli kuma an sauke shi ✓
keys.restored: An dawo da ajiyar maɓalli ✓ Maɓallai an shigar da su a cikin na’urar
keys.noBackup: Babu ajiyar da aka rufewa da sirri ga wannan asusun
keys.missingPublicKey: Ajiyar ba ta da maɓalli na jama’a

keySetup.title: Saita maɓallan na’urar ku
keySetup.description: Wannan na’urar ba ta da maɓallin sirriku har yanzu. Shigo da ajiyar da aka kiyaye da kalmar sirri, ko ƙirƙiri sabon maɓalli biyu (za ku iya karanta sabbin saƙonni daga yanzu).
keySetup.chooseFile: Zaɓi fayil kuma shigar da kalmar sirri.
keySetup.imported: An shigo da maɓallin sirri zuwa wannan na’urar. Yanzu za ku iya karanta tsofaffin saƙonni.
keySetup.enterPassword: Shigar da kalmar sirrin asusunku don mu iya ajiye maɓallanku cikin aminci.

auth.headline: Saƙon sirri ga kowa, a ko’ina
auth.description: Rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe, fassara zuwa harsuna 100+, saƙonni masu ɓacewa, da kiran murya/bidiyo.

feature.translation: Fassara saƙo mai hankali da aka gina a ciki
feature.disappearing: Saƙonni masu ɓacewa & rasit na karatu
feature.privacy: Tsarin sirri na farko. Bayananku, ikonku.
feature.translate: Fassara saƙo mai hankali da aka gina a ciki

hero.line1: Saƙon sirri ga kowa, a ko’ina — tare da
hero.sub: Samu lambar waya mai sirri kyauta don yin kira da saƙo a duniya ta Wi-Fi ko bayanai. Jin daɗin rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe, saƙonni masu ɓacewa, da kira murya/bidiyo HD — tare da kayan aikin da aka gina a ciki waɗanda ke taimaka muku ku ci gaba da haɗuwa a kan iyakoki.
hero.freeNote: Kiran da saƙo na asali kyauta ne. AI mai zurfi da fasaloli na musamman suna buƙatar haɓaka.

feat.translate: Karya shingen harshe a cikin tattaunawarku
feat.disappear: Saƙonni masu ɓacewa & rasit na karatu
feat.privacy: Tsarin sirri na farko. Bayananku, ikonku.

auth.desktopTip: A kan tebur? Yi scan da wayarka don samun app.
auth.scanHelper: A kan tebur? Yi scan da wayarka don samun app.
auth.subhead: Saƙon sirri, rufewa, da fassara — nan take.
auth.tip: Tukwici: Yi amfani da asusu ɗaya a yanar gizo da wayar hannu. Saƙonniku suna ci gaba da daidaitawa.
auth.scanHint: Yi scan don saukewa app ko buɗewa a burauzarku.

registration.passwordDescription: Mafi ƙarancin haruffa 6. Yi amfani da kalmar sirri mai ƙarfi, na musamman.
registration.smsConsent: Ta hanyar ƙirƙirar asusu, ka yarda da karɓar saƙonni na SMS da ke da alaƙa da ayyukanka na Chatforia (kamar saƙonni daga wasu masu amfani). Farashin saƙo & bayanai na iya aiki. Za ka iya ficewa a kowane lokaci a Saituna.

auth.addRecipient: Ƙara mai karɓa a sama don farawa…
auth.oneRecipient: Don Allah shigar da mai karɓa ɗaya a yanzu.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Shigar da sunan abokin hulɗa da aka ajiye ko lambar waya.
auth.sendFailed: Aiko ya gagara. Duba console don bayanai.

home.title: Gida
home.subheader: Aiko da saƙo don fara tattaunawa.

chat.selectPrompt: Zaɓi rubutu ko ɗakin tattaunawa don fara tattaunawa
chat.emptySubtitle: Aiko da saƙo don fara tattaunawa.
chat.blockConfirm: Toshe {{name}}? Ba za ku karɓi saƙonni daga gare su ba.
chat.blockError: Ba a iya gano mai amfani da za a toshe ba.
chat.blockFailed: Toshe ya gagara (backend ba a haɗa shi ba tukuna).
chat.encryptedUnavailable: Saƙon da aka rufewa (maɓalli ba a samu ba)
chat.unlockToView: Buɗe maɓallinka don ganin wannan saƙo

messageInput.freeLimit: Iyaka na shirin kyauta: auto-share har zuwa rana 1. An daure zuwa 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Iyakar auto-share na Premium shine kwanaki 30. An daure zuwa 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Rubuta saƙo ko haɗa fayil don aiko.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Rufewa ta gagara. Ba a aiko saƙo ba.
messageInput.caption: Bayani (na zaɓi)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Haɗi ya yi girma. Gwada ƙaramin fayil.
errors.unsupportedFile: Nau’in fayil ba a goyan bayan shi ba.
errors.rateLimit: Kana aiko saƙonni da sauri. Don Allah rage sauri.
errors.validation: Kuskuren tabbatarwa. Duba saƙonka kuma gwada kuma.
errors.failedToSend: Aiko ya gagara. Za ka iya sake ƙoƙarin bubble da ya gagara.

contactList.filterPlaceholder: Tace abokan hulɗa da aka ajiye…
contactList.filterAria: Tace abokan hulɗa da aka ajiye
contactList.noContactsFound: Babu abokan hulɗa da aka samu.
contactList.notJoined: Wannan abokin hulɗa bai shiga Chatforia ba tukuna.
contactList.couldNotStart: Ba a iya fara tattaunawa. Don Allah gwada kuma.
contactList.startFailed: Fara tattaunawa ta gagara. Don Allah gwada kuma.
contactList.deleteFailed: Share abokin hulɗa ya gagara. Don Allah gwada kuma.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Sabunta alias ya gagara. Don Allah gwada kuma.
contactList.loadFailed: Ya gagara lodin abokan hulɗa. Don Allah gwada kuma.
contactList.callStarted: Ana kiran wannan lamba ta lambar Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Fara kira ya gagara. Don Allah gwada kuma.

startChatModal.title: Fara tattaunawa
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Bincika suna, sunan mai amfani, ko lambar waya
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Babu abokan hulɗa da suka dace da bincikenka.
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: Babu mu’amaloli na baya-bayan nan tukuna.

addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Shigar da lambar waya ko sunan mai amfani.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Ba za ka iya ƙara kanka a matsayin abokin hulɗa ba.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Babu media da aka ajiye a cikin na’urar tukuna.

status.filesNote: Har zuwa fayiloli 5. 24h na ƙarewa ta tsoho.

voicemail.unreadDotAria: Alamar muryar waya da ba a karanta ba

profile.title: Bayanan Mai Amfani
profile.mustLogin: Dole ne ka shiga don ganin saituna.
profile.filterExplicit: Tace abun da ya wuce gona da iri
profile.allowExplicitContent: Bada abun da ya wuce gona da iri
profile.saveError: Kuskure: Ba a iya ajiye saituna ba
profile.noPrivateKey: Babu maɓallin sirri a wannan na’urar don fitarwa.
profile.setBackupPassword: Saita kalmar sirri don rufewa ajiyarka:
profile.backupDownloaded: An sauke ajiyar da aka rufewa.
profile.enterBackupPassword: Shigar da kalmar sirri na wannan ajiya:
profile.importSuccess: An shigo da maɓallin sirri zuwa wannan na’urar.
profile.importFailed: Ya gagara shigo da maɓalli (kalmar sirri ba daidai ba ko fayil da ya lalace).
profile.keysRotated: An ƙirƙiri sabon maɓalli biyu kuma an sauke maɓalli na jama’a.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Maɓallin sirrinka ba ya barin wannan na’urar. Fitar da kwafin da aka kiyaye da kalmar sirri don dawo da shi a wani na’urar.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Kana a kan Kyauta—yi amfani da zaɓin Sun/Moon da sauri a ƙasa. Haɓaka don buɗe ƙarin jigogi.
profile.moonTheme: Yi amfani da jigon Moon (Tsakar dare)
profile.backupDesc: Ajiye maɓallin rufewarka don dawo da saƙonniku cikin aminci a wani na’urar.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Blur lokacin da app ya fita daga hankali
profile.freePlanCopy: Kana a kan shirin kyauta. Haɓaka don buɗe ƙarin fasaloli kamar ajiyoyi, ƙarin lambobi, da zaɓin sirri mai zurfi.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ba a iya buɗe portal na biyan kuɗi ba. Don Allah gwada kuma.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Sanar da ni idan an kwafi saƙona
profile.followHint: Labarun su za su bayyana a cikin feed ɗin Following idan suka saka tare da masu sauraro Masu bi (ko Jama’a).
profile.userNotFound: Ba a samu mai amfani ba
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Wani abu ya yi kuskure a wannan sashi.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Aiko kira da saƙonni masu shigowa zuwa lambar waya ko imel ɗin da aka tabbatar. Kira/saƙonni masu fita na iya nuna lambar Chatforia.
profile.errE164: Shigar da lambar waya mai inganci ta E.164 (mis., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Zaɓi aƙalla wuri ɗaya (waya ko imel).
profile.errQuietHours: Awanni na natsuwa dole su kasance tsakanin 0 da 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Muna ajiye kawai matsayin shekaru (ba ainihin ranar haihuwa ba). Ana amfani da shi don kiyaye haɗaɗɗun tattaunawa na Bazara a cikin ma’ana.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Yi amfani da haɗaɗɗun shekaru a cikin Tattaunawa na Bazara
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Lokacin da aka kunne, muna ƙoƙarin haɗa ka da mutane a cikin matsayin shekaru masu dacewa.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Wane za a iya haɗa ka da su?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Matasa koyaushe ana haɗa su kawai da sauran matasa. Manya ba za a iya haɗa su da matasa ba.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Don tsaro, asusun da ke cikin matsayin shekaru 13–17 za a iya haɗa su kawai da sauran asusun 13–17 a cikin Tattaunawa na Bazara.
profile.foriaRemember: Bari Ria ta tuna abubuwan da ka gaya mata
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Lokacin da wannan ya kasance a kunne, Foria na iya amfani da tattaunawa na Bazara na baya (kawai tare da kai) don kiyaye tattaunawa ta gudana. Za ka iya kashe shi a kowane lokaci.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Bar fanko don kiyaye har abada
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Imel don aiko sanarwar muryar waya
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Ana amfani da shi lokacin da gaisuwar muryarka ba a samu ba.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: An sauke gaisuwar muryar waya cikin nasara
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Ya gagara sauke gaisuwar muryar waya
profile.voicemailNote: Muryar waya daga lambobin Chatforia za a ajiye a cikin akwatin muryar waya. Za ka iya bada rubutu da aiko a cikin shirye-shiryen da aka goyan baya.
profile.portHint: Kana son kiyaye lambarka ta yanzu? Za ka iya ɗaukar ta cikin Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Samu bayanai na wayar hannu na Chatforia lokacin da ka ke nesa da Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Sarrafa shirin wayar hannu na Chatforia, lambobi, aiko, da ɗaukar lamba.

options.heading: Zaɓi yadda kake son amfani da Chatforia
options.subheading: Za ka iya samun sabuwar lamba ta Chatforia, ko kawo lambarka ta yanzu daga wani mai ba da sabis.
options.portNumber: Ɗauki lambarka ta yanzu cikin Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Ɗauki lambarka ta yanzu
port.subheading: Matsar da lambar wayarka ta yanzu daga mai ba da sabis ɗin ka zuwa Chatforia. Tabbatar da bayanai sun dace da asusun mai ba da sabis ɗinka daidai don guje wa jinkiri.
port.phoneNumberLabel: Lambar waya da za a ɗauka
port.carrierLabel: Mai ba da sabis na yanzu
port.success: An aika buƙatar ɗaukawa! Za mu ci gaba da sabunta ka.

status.heading: Matsayin ɗaukawa
status.submitted: An aika zuwa mai ba da sabis

wireless.exhausted: Bayananka ya ƙare. Sayi sabon fakiti don ci gaba da amfani da bayanai na wayar hannu.

error.invite: Ba a iya ƙirƙirar gayyata ba. Tabbatar ka ne mai asusun iyali kuma gwada kuma.
error.checkout: Ba mu iya fara biyan kuɗi na shirin Iyali ba. Don Allah gwada kuma.

billing.myPlanError: Ba a iya lodin shirinka ba.
billing.freePlanCopy: Kana a kan shirin kyauta. Haɓaka don buɗe ƙarin fasaloli.
billing.portalError: Ba a iya buɗe portal na biyan kuɗi a yanzu ba.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Za ka iya sarrafa ko soke biyan kuɗin ka a cikin portal na biyan kuɗi, ko soke nan take a ƙasa.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Ka tabbata kana son soke shirinka nan take? Ba za a iya gyara wannan ba.
billing.cancelNowError: Ba a iya soke shirinka a yanzu ba. Don Allah gwada kuma ko yi amfani da Sarrafa biyan kuɗi.

none.title: Babu iyali da aka saita tukuna
none.body: Don ƙirƙirar Iyali na Chatforia da rukunin bayanai na gama gari, fara shirin Iyali.

data.heading: Rukunin bayanai na gama gari
data.caption: Duk membobi suna raba wannan rukunin. Za mu gargade ka yayin da ka kusanci iyaka.

invite.title: Gayyaci sabon memba
invite.body: Aiko da imel ko hanyar haɗi don gayyatar wani cikin rukunin bayanai na iyali.
invite.expiryHint: Wannan hanyar haɗi tana ƙarewa bayan ƙanana kwanaki. Za ka iya ƙirƙirar sabuwar a kowane lokaci.

join.title: Shiga iyali
join.body: An gayyace ka don shiga cikin Iyali na Chatforia kuma ka raba rukunin bayanai.
join.success: Ka shiga wannan iyali. Yanzu kana raba rukunin bayanai.
join.error: Ba mu iya ƙara ka cikin wannan iyali ba. Gayyatar na iya zama mara inganci ko ta ƙare.

premium.heading: Je Premium
premium.description: Buɗe fasaloli masu ƙarfi & cire talla.

upgrade.title: Haɓaka
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Fara da shirin kyauta mai talla. Je rashin talla tare da Plus, ko buɗe fasaloli masu cikakken ƙarfi tare da Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Zaɓi shirin app, ƙara fakitin bayanai ga kanka, ko raba bayanai tare da iyali — duk daga wuri ɗaya.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Fara da shirin kyauta mai talla. Je rashin talla tare da Plus, ko buɗe fasaloli masu cikakken ƙarfi tare da Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Ƙara bayanai na eSIM na duniya don Chatforia ta ci gaba da aiki ko da kana nesa da Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Ƙirƙiri rukunin bayanai na gama gari ga iyali kuma sarrafa amfanin kowa daga wuri ɗaya.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Buɗe fasaloli masu ƙarfi & cire talla.

free.title: Kyauta
free.desc: Fara saƙo kyauta. Kyakkyawan idan kana kawai gwada Chatforia.

features.chat: Tattaunawa ta ainihi 1:1 da ƙungiya, tare da kira murya da bidiyo
features.media: Raba hotuna, saƙonni na murya, da gajerun bidiyo
features.ai: Amsoshi mai hankali na AI da fassara nan take (amfani da adalci)
features.disappearing: Saƙonni masu ɓacewa da ikon sirri na asali
features.ads: Kyauta har abada tare da talla a cikin app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Duk abubuwan yau da kullum, ba tare da talla ba. Kyakkyawan ga saƙo da kira na yau da kullum.

features.allFree: Duk abin da ke cikin Kyauta, ba tare da talla ba
features.forwarding: Aiko kira da saƙonni zuwa lambar wayarka ta gaske
features.history: Tsawon tarihi na saƙo (har zuwa watanni 6)
features.support: Taimako mai sauri lokacin da wani abu ya yi kuskure

plus.ctaPublic: Samu Plus – ci gaba da shiga

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Kowane Wata)
premiumMonthly.desc: Cikakken kwarewa na Chatforia: kayan aikin AI, gyare-gyare, da taimako na farko.

features.plusAll: Duk abin da ke cikin Plus
features.themes: Buɗe duk jigogi masu launi na premium da gyare-gyaren app
features.ai: Kayan aikin AI na Premium kawai don rubutawa, amsoshi mai hankali, da taƙaitawa
features.support: Taimako na farko lokacin da ka fi buƙata

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Buɗe Premium – ci gaba da shiga

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Shekara-shekara)
premiumAnnual.desc: Ajiye ƙari idan an biya shekara-shekara — tare da ƙarin jigogi masu launi, kayan aikin AI, da taimako na farko.

features.allPremium: Duk abin da ke cikin Premium Kowane Wata — tare da ƙarin jigogi masu launi
features.annualBilling: An biya sau ɗaya a shekara
features.save25: Ajiye kusan 30% idan aka kwatanta da biyan kowane wata
features.bestFor: Mafi kyau ga masu amfani masu ƙarfi, ma’aikatan nesa, da masu balaguro masu yawa

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Ajiye 30% tare da shekara-shekara – ci gaba da shiga
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: An biya gaba. Soke a kowane lokaci. Babu ɓoyayyen kuɗi.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Fasaloli cikakke, sautuna, da kayan aikin AI mai ƙarfi.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Ajiye ƙari idan an biya shekara-shekara.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: An biya gaba. Soke a kowane lokaci. Babu ɓoyayyen kuɗi.

mobile.title: Chatforia Wayar Hannu (fakitin bayanai na eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Ƙara bayanai na duniya don kiyaye Chatforia tana aiki ko da ba tare da Wi-Fi ba. Farashi yana daidaita ta atomatik bisa ƙasar ka da kuɗi.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Zaɓi fakitin bayanai na duniya na sau ɗaya don Chatforia ta ci gaba da aiki lokacin da kake balaguro ko nesa da Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ba mu sayar da fakitin bayanai ƙasa da 3 GB ba.
mobile.localEqualsFallback: Na gida = ƙasar ka ta yanzu

features.heavyUse: Bayanai mai sauri don amfani mai yawa
features.throttle: Saurin na iya raguwa bayan amfani mai yawa
features.noContract: Fakiti na sau ɗaya, babu kwangila

disclaimer.devices: Fakitin bayanai na eSIM suna buƙatar na’urar da ke goyan bayan eSIM da ba a kulle ba. Samuwa ya bambanta bisa samfurin waya, mai ba da sabis, da ƙasa. Rufi da sauri ya bambanta bisa yanki.

small.title: Fakitin farawa
small.desc: Ya ƙunshi 3 GB na bayanai mai sauri — kyakkyawan ga saƙo na haske da kira na lokaci-lokaci.
small.bestFor: Gajeren balaguro, saƙo na haske, da kira na lokaci-lokaci
small.aria: Sayi fakitin bayanai na eSIM na farawa

medium.title: Fakitin balaguro
medium.desc: Ya ƙunshi 5 GB na bayanai mai sauri don balaguro, tafiya, da kira na VoIP na yau da kullum.
medium.bestFor: Balaguron karshen mako, kira na VoIP na yau da kullum, da taswira
medium.aria: Sayi fakitin bayanai na eSIM na balaguro

large.title: Fakitin ƙarfi
large.desc: Ya ƙunshi 10 GB na bayanai mai sauri don tattaunawa mai yawa, kira, da bidiyo a kan hanyar sadarwar Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Tattaunawa mai yawa, kira, bidiyo, da amfani da hotspot
large.aria: Sayi fakitin bayanai na eSIM na mai amfani mai ƙarfi

compare.title: Kwatanta fakitin bayanai na eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Amfani da ainihin bayanai ya dogara da yadda kake amfani da Chatforia (murya, bidiyo, media, da sauran app a kan wayarka).

family.title: Iyali na Chatforia (bayanai na gama gari)
family.subtitle: Raba rukunin bayanai ɗaya a cikin iyali. Biyan kuɗi ɗaya, asusun Chatforia da yawa, rufin duniya.

small.title: Iyali Ƙarami
small.desc: Ya ƙunshi 20 GB na bayanai mai sauri na gama gari — kyakkyawan ga masu amfani 2–3 na haske.

medium.title: Iyali Matsakaici
medium.desc: Ya ƙunshi 40 GB na bayanai mai sauri na gama gari — kyakkyawan ga membobi 3–5 masu aiki.

large.title: Iyali Babba
large.desc: Ya ƙunshi 80 GB na bayanai mai sauri na gama gari — ga iyalai masu ƙarfi waɗanda koyaushe suna kan layi.

feature.shared: Rukunin bayanai na gama gari ga iyali
feature.members: Gayyaci har zuwa membobi 4 na ƙari
feature.bestValue: Mafi kyawun ƙima a kowace GB
feature.fairUse: Ƙarƙashin manufofin amfani da adalci da iyaka na gida

family.disclaimer: Fakitin iyali suna ƙirƙira ko ƙara rukunin bayanai na gama gari. Za ka iya gayyata da cire membobi a kowane lokaci.
family.footnote: Fakitin iyali suna raba rukunin bayanai ɗaya a cikin asusun Chatforia masu alaƙa. Samuwa da iyaka sun dogara da ƙasar ka da dokokin gida.

why.title: Me ya sa mutane ke canzawa zuwa Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia tana ba ka lambar waya ta gaske, fassara mai hankali, da hanya mai sauƙi don rashin talla lokacin da ka shirya.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Talla mai sauƙi a Kyauta, haɓaka Plus mai sauƙi lokacin da ka shirya, da kayan aikin Premium waɗanda TextNow ba ta bayar ba.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App na zamani, tsarin duniya na farko, da fassara da aka gina a ciki maimakon tsohuwar hanyar aiko kira.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs app na saƙo
messengers.body: Rubuta lambobin waya na gaske — ba kawai sauran masu amfani na app ba — tare da AI da matsayi da aka gina a ciki. Kyakkyawan idan kana fitowa daga app kamar TextFree ko TextMe.

feature.translation: Auto-fassara da aka gina a ciki

why.disclaimer: Kwatance bisa bayanan da ake samu a jama’a kuma na iya canzawa a kan lokaci. Sauran app na saƙo kyauta kamar TextFree ko TextMe gabaɗaya sun yi kama da TextNow.

free.q: Shin shirin Kyauta da gaske kyauta ne?
free.a: Eh. Shirin Kyauta ya ƙunshi lamba ta Chatforia, kira, da saƙo tare da talla. Za ka iya zama a Kyauta har abada, ko haɓaka don cire talla da buɗe ƙarin fasaloli.

plusPremium.q: Menene bambanci tsakanin Plus da Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus yana cire talla kuma yana tsawaita tarihinka na saƙo — cikakken ga amfani na yau da kullum. Premium yana ƙara gyare-gyare na ƙari, kayan aikin AI don rubutawa da amsoshi, da taimako na farko ga masu amfani masu yawa.

esim.q: A ina fakitin bayanai na eSIM ke aiki?
esim.a: Chatforia Wayar Hannu tana amfani da rufin eSIM na duniya. Samuwa ya dogara da ƙasar ka da na’urar. Za ka ga zaɓin da aka goyan baya lokacin kunna a cikin app.

cancel.q: Zan iya soke ko canza tsare-tsare a kowane lokaci?
cancel.a: Eh. Za ka iya sarrafa ko soke biyan kuɗi daga shafin biyan kuɗi a cikin app. Canje-canje suna aiki a ƙarshen lokacin biyan kuɗi na yanzu.

family.a: Fakitin Iyali suna ƙirƙira rukunin bayanai na gama gari a cikin asusun Chatforia da yawa. Mutum ɗaya yana biyan kuɗi, kuma za ka iya gayyata ko cire membobi kuma saita iyaka ga kowane mutum.

gettingStarted.title: Fara
gettingStarted.subtitle: Sabon Chatforia? Wannan farawa mai sauri yana nuna abubuwan yau da kullum don ka iya zama mai aiki cikin mintoci.

alert.text: Wannan jagora zai girma yayin da muke ƙaddamar da sabbin fasaloli. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, sanar da mu ta hanyar

section2.title: 2) Fara saƙo
section2.item1: Ƙirƙiri DM ko Ƙungiya kuma aiko da saƙonka na farko.
section2.item2: Yi amfani da fassara nan take don tattaunawa a cikin harsuna 100+.
section2.item3: Gwada saƙonni masu ɓacewa da rasit na karatu a Profile → Sirri.

section3.title: 3) Ci gaba
section3.item1: Za ka iya haɓaka zuwa shiri mai biya a kowane lokaci a cikin app.
section3.item2: Da zarar ka shiga, za ka iya haɗa ƙarin na’urori kuma saita ajiyoyi masu rufewa daga Saituna a cikin app.

account.q: Yaya zan ƙirƙira ko dawo da asusuna?
account.a: Sauke app ko yi amfani da yanar gizo, danna “Ƙirƙiri asusu”, tabbatar da imel/waya. Don dawo da, yi amfani da “Ka manta kalmar sirri”.

privacy.a: Eh. Saƙonni da kira suna rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe ta tsoho. Kai da mai karɓa kawai za su iya karantawa.

translate.q: Yaya fassara nan take ke aiki?
translate.a: Bada “Auto-fassara” a Saituna → Bayyana & Harshe. Muna fassara a kan na’urar inda aka goyan baya, in ba haka ba ta hanyar API masu aminci tare da ƙananan bayanai.

contact.a: Tuntube mu a support@chatforia.com. Haɗa hotunan allo da sigar app ɗinka.

contact.title: Tuntube Mu
contact.successMsg: Godiya—ƙungiyarmu za ta amsa ta imel.
contact.errorSend: Ba a iya aiko ba. Don Allah aiko imel zuwa support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Wannan Manufofin Sirri yana bayyana yadda Chatforia (“mu”, “mu”) ke tattarawa, amfani, da raba bayanai lokacin da kake amfani da app da sabis ɗinmu. Muna tsara Chatforia don rage bayanan da za mu iya samu.

infoWeCollect.title: Bayanin da muke tattarawa
infoWeCollect.account: Bayanin asusu (mis., imel/waya) don ƙirƙira da tsare asusunka.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Abun ciki da aka rufewa (saƙonni/kira) yana rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe; ba za mu iya karantawa ba.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Bayanin bincike/amfani kamar rajistan kuskure, nau’in na’ura, ko ƙananan bincike don inganta aiki.

sms.title: Lambobin waya na hannu da SMS
sms.body: Idan ka zaɓi bayar da lambar waya ta hannu, muna amfani da ita don bada fasaloli kamar tabbatar da asusu, sanarwar shiga, da saƙon mai amfani zuwa mai amfani ta SMS inda aka goyan baya. Za mu iya aiko saƙonni na SMS masu alaƙa da asusunka da ayyuka a Chatforia. Za ka iya ficewa daga karɓar saƙonni na SMS a kowane lokaci ta hanyar amsa da kalmar ficewa da aka goyan baya (kamar “STOP”) ko ta hanyar canza zaɓin sanarwa a cikin app. Ba mu sayar da lambar wayarka ba ko amfani da ita don tallace-tallace mara alaƙa.
sms.addRecipient: Ƙara mai karɓa a sama don farawa…

howWeUse.title: Yadda muke amfani da bayanai
howWeUse.provide: Bayarwa da tsare sabis (tabbatarwa, gano spam/zalunci).
howWeUse.legal: Yin biyayya ga wajibai na doka.

sharing.title: Raba
sharing.body: Ba mu sayar da bayanan sirri ba. Za mu iya raba ƙananan bayanai tare da masu sarrafawa (mis., sanarwar turawa, bincike) ƙarƙashin kwangiloli masu tsauri.

rights.title: Hakkin ka
rights.body: Bisa yankinka (mis., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), za ka iya neman samun dama, gyara, share, ko ficewa daga wasu ayyuka. Tuntube: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Riƙewa bayanai & tsaro
retention.body: Muna riƙe kawai abin da ake buƙata don gudanar da sabis kuma muna amfani da tsaro na masana’anta. Abun ciki na E2E ba za a iya warware shi ba daga gare mu.

children.title: Yara
children.body: Chatforia ba ta nufi yara ƙasa da shekara 13 ba (ko kamar yadda dokar yankinka ta buƙata).

changes.title: Canje-canje
changes.body: Za mu saka sabuntawa a nan kuma mu sabunta kwanan “An sabunta ƙarshe”.

contact.title: Tuntuba
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, Amurka

intro.body: Ta hanyar amfani da Chatforia ka yarda da waɗannan Sharuɗɗa. Idan ba ka yarda ba, kada ka yi amfani da sabis.

accounts.title: Asusun
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Bayar da bayanai masu inganci kuma kiyaye shaidar shiga cikin tsaro.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Kai ne ke da alhakin ayyuka a kan asusunka.

acceptableUse.title: Amfani mai kyau
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Babu abun ciki na haram, zagi, ko cin zarafi; babu spam ko zagi na atomatik.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Za mu iya dakatarwa/ƙarewa don cin zarafi.

sms.title: Sadarwar SMS
sms.body: Idan ka bayar da lambar waya ta hannu, ka yarda cewa Chatforia na iya aiko maka saƙonni na SMS masu alaƙa da asusunka da amfani da sabis, kamar sanarwar shiga, sanarwar tsaro, da saƙonni masu alaƙa da tattaunawa da ka fara ko ka shiga. Ba mu yi amfani da SMS don saƙonni na tallace-tallace ko tallace-tallace ba ba tare da iznin ka na musamman ba. Farashin saƙo na yau da kullum da bayanai na iya aiki. Za ka iya ficewa daga saƙonni na SMS a kowane lokaci ta hanyar amsa da kalmar ficewa da aka goyan baya (misalan, “STOP”) ko ta hanyar sabunta saitunan sanarwa a cikin app.

yourContent.title: Abubuwan ka
yourContent.body: Ka riƙe haƙƙin abubuwanka. Ka ba mu haƙƙin da ake buƙata don gudanar da sabis (mis., hanyar wucewa, ajiya, fassara).

disclaimer.title: Gargadi & alhaki
disclaimer.body: Sabis an bayar da shi “kamar yadda yake” ba tare da garanti ba. Har zuwa mafi girman abin da doka ta ba da izini, Chatforia ba ta da alhakin lalacewa na kai tsaye ko na sakamako.

changes.title: Canje-canje
changes.body: Za mu iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗa; ci gaba da amfani bayan canje-canje yana nufin yarda.

contact.title: Tuntuba
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, Amurka

doNotSell.title: Kada Ka Sayar ko Raba Bayanan Sirri Na
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ba ta sayar da bayanan sirri ba. Mazaunan California za su iya gabatar da buƙatu ƙarƙashin CPRA ta hanyar maɓalli a ƙasa.

cookies.title: Saitunan Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia tana amfani da ƙananan cookie (mis., zaman, tsaro). Ba mu yi amfani da cookie na tallace-tallace na ɓangare na uku ba. Sarrafa cookie ta saitunan burauzarka.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Ba a iya lodin matsayin lambar waya ba.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Babu lamba da aka sanya. Zaɓi ɗaya ta hanyar lamba don fara saƙo.

startChatModal.title: Fara tattaunawa
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Rubuta suna, sunan mai amfani, waya, ko imel…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Bincika ta sunan mai amfani ko waya
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Rubuta sunan mai amfani ko waya kuma danna Bincika.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Shigarwar waya/imel za su kasance samuwa bayan ka ajiye su a matsayin abokan hulɗa.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Ya gagara fara tattaunawa tare da zaɓaɓɓun masu karɓa.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Saƙo na farko (na zaɓi amma an shawarce)

sounds.freeNotice: Kana a kan Kyauta — sautuna na premium ana nuna su amma an kulle su. Haɓaka don buɗe duka.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Wannan fasalin yana buƙatar shirin Premium.

aiSettings.title: Saitunan AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Sarrafa fassara, amsoshi mai hankali, da amsoshin atomatik na ForiaBot.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Nuna rubutu na asali tare da fassara
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Aiko da ƙarshen saƙonni da aka karɓa (an tsabtace) zuwa AI don ba da shawarar amsoshi mai sauri.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Rufe zagi a cikin shawarwarin AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Idan a kunne, shawarwarin da AI ta dawo da su za su rufe kalmomi da aka yi alama
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Bada amsa ta atomatik lokacin da nake aiki
aiSettings.translateTagged: Kawai lokacin @fassara ko aka yi alama
aiSettings.modeMention: Kawai lokacin da aka ambace ni @

accessibilitySettings.title: Sauƙi & Sanarwa
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Zaɓi don sauƙaƙa amfani da Chatforia ba tare da dogaro da sauti ba.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Yana farawa da girman na al’ada. Ƙara idan ka fi son rubutu mai girma a cikin saitunan sauƙi.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Sanarwa na gani ga saƙonni & kira
Nuna banner da kyalkyali na take don kada ka rasa aiki.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate a kan sabbin saƙonni (lokacin da aka goyan baya)
Tara vibration na na’ura tare da sanarwa.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Kyalkyali na allo a kan kira mai shigowa
Kyalkyali mai haske na ɗan gajeren lokaci lokacin da kira ke ringi.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Haɗa rubutu zuwa saƙonni na murya da ka karɓa.
accessibilitySettings.changesSavedInstantly: Canje-canje ana ajiye su nan take.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Sanarwa na gani ga saƙonni & kira
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Nuna banner da kyalkyali na take don kada ka rasa aiki.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate a kan sabbin saƙonni (lokacin da aka goyan baya)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Tara vibration na na’ura tare da sanarwa.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Kyalkyali na allo a kan kira mai shigowa
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Kyalkyali mai haske na ɗan gajeren lokaci lokacin da kira ke ringi.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Ajiye kawai ciphertext a kan server. Yana kashe AI/Fassara da dubawa na daidaitawa.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Na’urori Masu Alaƙa
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Babu na’urori masu alaƙa da aka samu.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Bincika ta alias, suna, sunan mai amfani, ko waya
peoplePage.filterSaved: Tace abokan hulɗa da aka ajiye
peoplePage.noContactsFound: Babu abokan hulɗa da aka samu
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Wasu hanyoyi masu sauri don farawa.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Bincika ta waya / sunan mai amfani
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Raba hanyar haɗi na gayyata don fara tattaunawa nan take.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Ci gaba da haɗuwa a hanya tare da Chatforia na iOS da Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tukwici: Saƙonniku suna ci gaba da daidaitawa a yanar gizo da wayar hannu.

randomChat.title: Tattaunawa na Bazara
randomChat.description: Haɗu da wani sabo nan take’. Za mu haɗa ka kuma buɗe ɗakin tattaunawa na wucin gadi.’ Tattauna ba tare da sanin suna ba a farko. Ƙara Aboki daga baya idan ya dace.
randomChat.noPartner: Ba a samu abokin tarayya a yanzu ba.
randomChat.saveGuard: Tattaunawa tsakanin mutum da mutum kawai za a iya ajiyewa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Muna ajiye kawai matsayin shekaru (ba ainihin ranar haihuwa ba). Ana amfani da shi don kiyaye haɗaɗɗun tattaunawa na Bazara a cikin ma’ana. Don haɗa da mutane (ba kawai RiaBot ba), saita matsayin shekarunka a Saituna → Shekaru & Tattaunawa na Bazara.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Saita matsayin shekarunka a Profile → Shekaru & Tattaunawa na Bazara don a haɗa ka da mutane.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Don haɗa da mutane (ba kawai RiaBot ba), saita matsayin shekarunka a Saituna → Shekaru & Tattaunawa na Bazara.
randomChat.subtitle: Haɗu da wani sabo nan take, ko zaɓi tattaunawa da Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Saita matsayin shekarunka a Profile → Shekaru & Tattaunawa na Bazara don a haɗa ka da mutane.

ria.intro: Hey can 👋 Ni Ria. Me ke cikin zuciyarka?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ina nan. Me ke cikin zuciyarka?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Me kake so mu tattauna a yau?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}!! Ina sauraro — me ke faruwa?
greetings.long4: Kyakkyawan ganinka, {{name}} 👋 Me ke cikin zuciyarka a yau?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 Kana son zubar da hankali, tambaya, ko kawai tattauna?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Ina da lokaci — me kake so mu tattauna?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, har yanzu ina nan. Me ke faruwa?
greetings.short2: Barka da dawowa {{name}} 👋 Akwai wani abu da kake so ka ƙara?
greetings.short3: Ka dawo kuma, {{name}}? 😊 Ka gaya mini me ke cikin zuciyarka.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 A shirye don ci gaba da inda muka tsaya?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! Kana da wani sabon abu a cikin zuciyarka?

login.title: Ci gaba da Chatforia
login.subtitle: Shiga asusun Chatforia
login.googleUnavailable: Shigar da Google ba a samu ba
login.appleUnavailable: Shigar da Apple ba a samu ba

forgot.title: Ka Manta Kalmar Sirri
forgot.helper: Shigar da imel ɗin da ka yi amfani da shi don ƙirƙirar asusun Chatforia kuma za mu aiko maka da hanyar haɗi mai aminci don sake saita kalmar sirri.
forgot.emailInvalid: Don Allah shigar da imel mai inganci.
forgot.genericError: Ba a iya aiwatar da buƙata ba. Don Allah gwada kuma a ɗan lokaci.
forgot.sending: Ana aiko hanyar haɗi na sake saiti...
forgot.sendCta: Aiko Hanyar Haɗi na Sake Saiti
forgot.sentHelper: Idan asusu yana wanzu tare da wannan imel, mun aiko da hanyar haɗi na sake saita kalmar sirri. Na iya ɗaukar ƙanana mintoci don isowa. Tabbatar da duba spam ko folder na tallace-tallace.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on ba a samu a yanzu ba. Yi amfani da sunan mai amfani & kalmar sirri a maimakon.

error.invalid: Sunan mai amfani ko kalmar sirri ba daidai ba
error.unprocessable: Buƙata ba ta dace ba. Duba sunan mai amfani/imel da kalmar sirri.
error.deviceLimit: Iyaka na na’ura an kai ga shirin Kyauta. Fita a wani na’urar ko haɓaka zuwa Premium don haɗa ƙarin na’urori.
error.premiumRequired: Wannan aiki yana buƙatar shirin Premium.

dialer.title: Kira
dialer.subtitle: Kiyaye lamba & na baya-bayan nan. (Idan ba ka yi amfani da PSTN ba, fara kira daga kan tattaunawa.)
dialer.recentsEmpty: Babu kira na baya-bayan nan tukuna.
dialer.noRecents: Babu kira na baya-bayan nan tukuna.

video.deeplinkTip: Tukwici: za ka iya haɗa kai tsaye zuwa /video?room=sunan-ɗaki.

direct.tipInvite: Tukwici: Liƙa lamba kuma kira ba tare da ajiye abokin hulɗa ba. Za mu gayyaci waɗanda ba su yi amfani ba ta hanyar haɗi.

phoneWarning.title: Lambar ka tana ƙarewa nan da nan
phoneWarning.body: Lambar ka {{number}} za a saki a {{date}} sai dai idan an sake kunnawa.

support.heading: Yaya za mu iya taimaka?
support.contactIntro: Za mu aiko maka amsa ta imel. Haɗa bayanai don taimaka mana maimaita matsalar.
support.sent: An aiko saƙo. Za mu amsa ta imel.
support.sendError: Ba a iya aiko ba. Aiko imel zuwa support@chatforia.com a maimakon.

encryptionRecovery.title: Sarrafa Rufewa
encryptionRecovery.description: Ajiye, dawo da, buɗe, ko sake saita maɓallin rufewa.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Wannan burauza ba za ta iya warware saƙonnikinka masu rufewa ba a yanzu. Dawo da, buɗe, ko sake saita maɓallinka don ci gaba.

unlockPasscode.label: Buɗe lambar sirri (na’urar yanzu)
unlockPasscode.description: Ana amfani da shi don warware maɓallanka a cikin na’urar kafin fitarwa

backupPassword.label: Kalmar sirri na ajiya
backupPassword.description: Ana amfani da shi don rufewa fayil na ajiya

restoreBackupPassword.label: Kalmar sirri na ajiya
restoreBackupPassword.description: Kalmar sirri da ka ƙirƙira lokacin ajiye maɓallinka a iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Sabuwar lambar sirri na gida

resetLocalPasscode.label: Sabuwar lambar sirri na gida
resetLocalPasscode.description: Ana buƙata kafin sake saita don sabon maɓalli ya kasance kare a wannan na’urar

messages.backupCreated: An ƙirƙiri ajiyar maɓalli kuma an sauke shi.
messages.keyRestored: An dawo da maɓalli daga ajiyar asusu.
messages.resetSuccess: An sake saita rufewa cikin nasara.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Dawo da maɓalli bai cika ba ko ba daidai ba ga wannan asusu
errors.noBackup: Babu ajiyar da aka rufewa da ke wanzu ga wannan asusu
errors.missingPublicKey: Ajiyar ba ta da maɓalli na jama’a
errors.noServerPublicKey: Wannan asusu ba ya nuna maɓalli na jama’a na server a yanzu
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Ajiyar server ba ta dace da maɓallin rufewa na asusu na yanzu ba
errors.incompleteMetadata: Bayanan ajiya ba su cika ba
errors.resetIncomplete: Sake saita rufewa bai gama daidai ba

confirm.reset:
Sake saita rufewa ga wannan asusu?

Tsofaffin saƙonni masu rufewa na iya zama ba za a iya karantawa ba sai dai idan ka dawo da maɓalli na asali daga baya.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Wannan yana ƙirƙirar sabon maɓallin rufewa ga asusunka. Tsofaffin saƙonni masu rufewa na iya zama ba za a iya karantawa ba sai dai idan ka dawo da maɓalli na asali daga baya.

press.title: Jarida
press.contactLine: Don tambayoyin jarida, tuntube mu a
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia app ce ta saƙo mai sirri na farko wanda ke sauƙaƙa tattaunawar harshe daban-daban. Saƙonni suna rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe ta tsoho, kuma fassara da aka gina a ciki tana goyan bayan harsuna 100+ nan take. Masu amfani za su iya bada saƙonni masu ɓacewa, kiyaye rasit na karatu na zaɓi, da daidaitawa a kan na’urori. Ana samuwa a iOS, Android, da yanar gizo.
press.assetsSubtitle: Tambura, hotunan allo, da hotunan samfur.
press.scanTip: A kan tebur? Yi scan da wayarka don samun app.

careers.title: Ayyuka
careers.intro: Mu ƙaramin ƙungiyar kafa muke ginawa Chatforia — mai saƙo na duniya mai sirri wanda ke ƙaddamarwa a yanar gizo, iOS, da Android. Idan ka damu da sirri, rufewa, da abubuwan da ke farin ciki ga mai amfani, muna son mu ji daga gare ka.
careers.openRoles: Matsayin kafa da ke buɗe: Jagoran Injiniyan Cikakken Stack, Injiniyan Backend (Node.js), Injiniyan Frontend/Yanar Gizo (React), Injiniyan Wayar Hannu (iOS), Injiniyan Wayar Hannu (Android), DevOps/SRE, Injiniyan Tsaro & Rufewa, Injiniyan Sadarwa (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Yadda ake nema: Yi amfani da maɓalli a ƙasa don aiko da resume da hanyoyin haɗi ta imel.
careers.whyBullets:
• Taimaka ginawa tushe na sabuwar mai saƙo na duniya.
• Aika ingantawa da ake amfani da su a yanar gizo, iOS, da Android.
• Yi aiki kai tsaye tare da mai kafa kan tsari da jagorar samfur.
• Mallaki wurare masu tasiri a cikin stack: saƙo, murya, bidiyo, rufewa, sadarwa, AI.
• Shiga a farkon — kafin ƙungiyar masu amfani ta girma.

about.title: Game da Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia mai saƙo ne mai sirri, mai yawan harshe tare da rufewa ƙarshe-zu-ƙarshe, fassara nan take, da kira murya/bidiyo. Manufarmu ita ce mai sauƙi: taimaka wa mutane su haɗu—cikin aminci, sirri, da a kan harsuna daban-daban.

values.privacy: Sirri na farko: Rufewa E2E ta tsoho.
values.control: Ikon: Saƙonni masu ɓacewa & rasit na karatu na zaɓi.
values.privacy_aria: Sirri na farko: Rufewa E2E ta tsoho.
values.control_aria: Ikon: Saƙonni masu ɓacewa da rasit na karatu na zaɓi.

about.howDescription: Saƙonni ana rufewa a kan na’urarka kafin su bar ta. Fassara, ajiyoyi, da daidaitawar na’ura an tsara su don rage abin da server ɗinmu zai iya gani.

advertise.title: Tallata tare da Chatforia
advertise.description: Kai ga masu amfani da saƙo masu aiki tare da wurare masu dadi, masu aminci ga al’umma. Muna ba da wuraren banner a wurare masu haske, tallace-tallace, da tallace-tallace na gida. Masu biyan kuɗi na Premium ba su ganin talla ba.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Muna kuma ba da wurare ta Google AdSense. Za ka iya niyya Chatforia tare da ID na wallafa {{pubId}}, ko yi amfani da fom a ƙasa don tallace-tallace kai tsaye.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Muna kuma ba da wasu wurare ta Google AdSense. Tallace-tallace kai tsaye suna samuwa—yi amfani da fom a ƙasa.

placement.acceptedSizes: Girke-girke da aka yarda da su

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Muna kammala kayan ajiyar tallarmu. Ka gaya mana game da kamfen ɗinka kuma za mu ba da shawarar wurare.

why.highSession: Mitar zaman mai girma da lokacin zama a cikin UI na tattaunawa
why.brandSafe: Nau’o’in al’umma masu aminci; ƙayyadaddun mitar da aka mutunta
why.sponsoredMoments: Lokutan tallace-tallace (mis., modal na “Fara Tattaunawa”) suna samuwa
why.deals: Yarjejeniyoyi kai tsaye ko na shirin ta AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Godiya! Buƙatarka tana kan hanya. Za mu ci gaba da tuntuba nan da nan.
form.missingRequired: Don Allah cika suna, imel, da saƙo.
form.successToast: Godiya! Za mu tuntuba da sauri.
form.mailtoInfo: Ana buɗe abokin imel ɗinka don aiko da buƙata…
form.messageLabel: Ka gaya mana game da kamfen ɗinka

legal.disclaimerStart: Ta hanyar gabatarwa, ka yarda da
